item.title: Avian Condor Fretless Bass w/ Gig Bag (Pre-Owned) — $495
item.description:
$495 · Good · Bananas at Large®

Avian Condor Fretless Bass w/ Gig Bag (Pre-Owned)

This Avian Condor is a unique, premium, mod-friendly 4-string electric bass. It's known for its violin-style scroll headstock and large, open pickup cavity designed for easy customizations. Though originally designed to have frets, fretless versions are desirable for their smooth, singing, upright-like tone.

This bass is strung with round wound strings. It is in Good Condition.

FEATURES
  • Basswood Avian Condor Body with Figured Maple Cap
  • Bolt-On Maple Neck
  • Rosewood Fingerboard
  • Smooth Lined Fretless Playing Surface
  • 1-5/8 in. Nut Width
  • 34 in. Scale
  • Large, Open Pickup Cavity designed for Easy Customizations
  • Dual Coil Bridge Pickup
  • Single Coil Neck Pickup
  • 4-way Blade Pickup Selector Switch
  • Volume and Tone Controls
  • Distinctive Violin-Style Scroll Headstock
  • Wilkinson Tuners and Hardware
  • Strung with Round Wound Strings
  • Gig Bag Included
  • Good Condition

Any questions, please ask!

*Legal Disclaimer: Due to the nature of Pre-Owned Products, Bananas At Large Inc. does not claim this instrument to be 100% original. Any Questions please ask before buying*

item.title: Stradi Symphony "Earth" Fretless 4 String Bass 2022 w/ COA, case, etc. — $4,500
item.description:
$4,500 · Excellent · vandowsky

Stradi Symphony 4 String ~Earth~ Fretless

These don't come along often! Proof that instruments can also be pieces of art.

Amazing condition. No wear, damage, or issues. The only sign that it's ever been played is some slight shininess where the strings touch the fretboard when played. Lightweight, comfortable, very "alive" feeling. Huge variety of tones possible with the Delano pickup and piezo, which can be blended together to your liking with the blend knob.

Comes in its original hard case with certificate (great condition), adjustment tools, and case keys.


Will ship via UPS Ground, signature required.


Please, no trade offers at this time.


Body deeply roasted oak body + 1 piece poplar burl top

Fingerboard Amazaque (also called Ovangkol or Shedua)

Position markers Luminlay side lines + brass "swirl" markers on fingerboard

Neck Flame maple + roasted flame maple

Scale 34"

Pickups Delano Xtender + piezo

Controls Master volume, pickup blend, master tone, pickup variation switch (series/coil tap/parallel)

Weight 7lbs 9.7oz

item.title: Bruno Guitars Telebird Bass ~japan BOUTIQUE~ w/ gig bag — $1,699
item.description:
$1,699 · Very Good · vandowsky

Extremely rare (and no longer made!)

Bruno Guitars from Japan produces small batches of high-quality instruments. They are well-known for their "TN-295" guitar model, popularized by jazz guitarist Toshiki Soejima. That guitar is kind of a mash-up of a Fender Tele and a Gibson LP. This Telebird bass continues along those lines, being a cool part-Tele bass and part-Thunderbird. Builders in Japan are making some of the best instruments in the world, and this is a great example of their skill.

For more info on this brand and model, check out brunoguitars.com

The bass is in great condition. It has a relic'd finish from the workshop, and I believe most (or all) of the "wear" is original. Frets are clean and show only a tiny amount of wear. Electronics function as they should. Plays & sounds great!

Will be shipped via UPS Ground, signature required, in a gig bag (pictured).


Please, no trade offers at this time.


Specs:

Neck ▶ Hard Maple

Finger Board ▶ Rosewood 20f (Radius 240mm/9.5")

Scale ▶ 864mm (34")

Joint ▶ Bolt-on 4Point Joint

Body ▶ Mahogany

Finish ▶ Nitrocellulose Lacquer

Pickups ▶ Montreux 1964 Vintage Thunderbird 

Bridge ▶ Original

Color ▶ Candy Apple Red

Texture ▶ Relic​​

item.title: Fender 75th Anniversary Player II Precision Bass Seafoam Green — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · Truetone Music

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Precision Bass® — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Precision Bass radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 20 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass® pickups offer sweet highs, musical mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. An adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Precision Bass has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Features
  • 75th Anniversary Limited Colors
  • 75th Anniversary Neck Plate
  • Contoured Alder Body
  • Modern "C" Neck Profile
  • 9.5“-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
  • Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil Precision Bass® Pickups

Model No.: 0146470549

Product Specs General Series: Limited Edition 75th Anniversary Precision Bass Collection Orientation: Right-Hand Color: Sea Foam Green Country Of Origin: Mexico

Neck Neck Material: Maple Neck Finish: Satin Urethane Neck Shape: Modern "C" Fingerboard Radius: 9.5" (241 mm) Fingerboard Material: Rosewood Position Inlays: White Dot Side Dots: White Number of Frets: 20 String Nut: Synthetic Bone Nut Width: 1.625" (41.3 mm) Nut Material: Synthetic Bone Fret Size: Medium Jumbo Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)

Body Body: Alder Body Finish: Polyester Body Shape: Precision Bass® Body Style: Solid Body Body Material: Alder

Hardware Bridge: 4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel “Barrel” Saddles Pickguard: 3-Ply Parchment Pickup Covers: Black Control Knobs: Knurled Flat-Top Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome Tuning Machines: Standard Open-Gear Strings: Fender® USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406 Neck Plate: 4-Bolt

Electronics Middle Pickup: Player Series Alnico 5 Split Single-Coil Precision Bass® Pickup Configuration: S Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone

item.title: G&L Tribute Series Kiloton with Maple Fretboard 2010s - Irish Ale — $675
item.description:
$675 · Excellent · THE BASSMENT

I received this in a trade and left it in the case in the closet. Now I'm downsizing my home and no longer have room for all of my guitars, so this is one I'm letting go. Hard Case Included.

The G&L Tribute Series Kiloton in Irish Ale is a 4-string electric bass guitar. It features a lightweight swamp ash body with a tortoise pickguard, a hard-rock maple neck and fingerboard, and a USA-made Leo Fender-designed G&L Magnetic Field Design (MFD) humbucker pickup positioned in the "sweet spot".

Key Features and Specifications

  • Construction & Scale: Bolt-on design with a 34-inch scale and 12-inch neck radius.
  • Neck: 1.5-inch nut width with a medium C profile and 21 medium-jumbo nickel frets.
  • Electronics: 3-way series/split/parallel mini-toggle, master volume, and master tone controls.
  • Hardware: Traditional open-back tuning keys and a Leo Fender-designed G&L Saddle-Lock bridge. [1]

Community Consensus

The Tribute Series Kiloton is known for its incredible output, punch, and tonal versatility. Bassists on TalkBass generally agree that the MFD pickup provides a highly aggressive grind and growl. Furthermore, players frequently note that unlike many import/budget lines, the Tribute Kiloton uses the exact same USA-made electronics and bridge hardware as its more expensive Fullerton-made American counterparts.

item.title: Fender Aerodyne Jazz Bass 2022 - Black — $1,114.68
item.description:
$1,114.68 · Very Good · James's Gear Outlet

Fender Aerodyne Jazz Bass – Made in Japan – Midnight Black – Model 0254505506

A stunning example of Fender Japan craftsmanship. This 2022 Fender Aerodyne Jazz Bass combines the classic Jazz Bass feel with the versatility of a Precision/Jazz pickup configuration in a sleek, modern Aerodyne design.

Made in Japan with Fender’s renowned attention to detail, this bass features a beautifully carved basswood body, cream body binding, matching black headstock, and the iconic no-pickguard Aerodyne look.

The P/J pickup configuration delivers the best of both worlds — the warm punch of a Precision Bass pickup combined with the clarity and growl of a Jazz Bass bridge pickup. Perfect for rock, blues, funk, studio work, and live performance.

Specifications:

  • Model: Fender Aerodyne Jazz Bass
  • Model Number: 0254505506
  • Year: 2022
  • Serial Number: JD22001579
  • Made in Japan
  • Finish: Midnight Black
  • Pickup Configuration: P/J
  • No pickguard Aerodyne design
  • Maple neck with rosewood fingerboard
  • Fender Jazz Bass neck profile

This is a discontinued Japanese Fender model that is becoming increasingly difficult to find, especially in this classic black finish.

Condition:
Excellent condition. Fully inspected and playing properly. Please review photos carefully for the most accurate representation of condition.

Includes hard shell case

Ships securely packed. Shipping available across Canada and the USA. Buyer pays shipping. Please message with postal/zip code for an exact quote.

Ships from Canada. Will be packed securely with proper protection. Buyer responsible for any applicable duties or import fees. United States buyers please contact for shipping and duties quote.

item.title: Fender Victor Bailey Signature Acoustic-Electric Bass (VB-NAT) – Mint/Collector Condition 2010 — $999
item.description:
$999 · Excellent · EL Jefe Guitars

This is an exceptionally clean Fender Victor Bailey Signature Acoustic-Electric Bass (VB-NAT) in Natural finish. It was purchased new, has spent virtually its entire life stored in its case, and has been played for an estimated 30 minutes total. It is as close to new as you’re likely to find.

The bass features a solid spruce top with beautiful figured dao back and sides, a comfortable cutaway body, and the factory Fender/Fishman preamp with built-in tuner. It also has premium gold Hipshot Ultralite tuning machines, which improve balance while maintaining tuning stability.

There are no cracks, repairs, or structural issues. The neck is straight, the frets show essentially no wear, and the finish still has a showroom-quality gloss. The electronics function properly, and the original Fender gig bag is included.

Victor Bailey was one of the world’s most respected bassists, and his signature acoustic basses have developed a loyal following. Fender no longer produces this model, making clean examples increasingly difficult to find.

Features:

  • Fender Victor Bailey Signature VB-NAT
  • Solid spruce top
  • Dao back and sides
  • Cutaway acoustic body
  • Factory Fender/Fishman preamp with built-in tuner
  • Premium gold Hipshot Ultralite tuners
  • Original Fender gig bag included
  • Made in China
  • Collector-quality condition

If you’re looking for one of the cleanest Victor Bailey acoustic basses available, this is an outstanding example that has been carefully stored and barely played since new.

item.title: 2014 ESP LTD B-4E 4-String Bass Guitar — $649.99
item.description:
$649.99 · Very Good · Ray's Midbell Music

For your consideration is a 2014 ESP LTD B-4E NS 4-String Electric Bass Guitar in Natural Satin finish. This neck-through bass delivers excellent sustain, modern playability, and a versatile active electronics package that makes it equally at home on stage, in the studio, or in the practice room. Featuring a beautifully figured natural satin finish with contrasting center neck laminates, this B-4E offers premium appointments and a sleek appearance that stands out without being overly flashy.


The bass has been fully tested and functions exactly as it should. The neck is straight, the truss rod operates properly, and the electronics are quiet and responsive. The frets show very little wear, providing a comfortable playing experience across the entire fingerboard.


Cosmetically, this instrument is in Very Good condition. It shows normal signs of use, including a few small dings, light finish scuffs, and minor surface scratches. The most noticeable cosmetic imperfections include a small finish chip on the rear horn, light finish wear along the edge of the upper horn, and a small ding on the back near the electronics cavity. None of these affect the playability or structural integrity of the instrument. Please review all photos carefully as they are part of the description.


This B-4E offers a wide tonal range, from warm, full-bodied lows to articulate mids and crisp highs, making it an excellent choice for virtually any musical style. The neck-through construction provides exceptional sustain and upper fret access, while the active EQ allows you to easily shape your sound for live performance or recording.


The bass will be professionally packed to ensure safe arrival to a prospective buyer.


Please feel free to contact us with any questions before purchasing.


Thank you for your consideration!

Please examine all the pictures and read the entire description carefully before buying. If you have any questions, please feel free to ask. For payments, we gladly accept Reverb Direct Checkout, Paypal or credit card payment.


About Us:

Ray’s Mid-Bell Music is a full-service school music dealer located in Sioux City, IA. The original company was founded in 1939. We have had a Sioux City location since 1972. You can buy with confidence knowing that you are dealing with a reputable brick and mortar store with a long history of excellent customer service.


Unless stated differently above, all used and vintage instruments are sold in the condition that we received it in. All repair facilities have different pricing. Please check with your local technician for approximate repair costs and, if purchased, ultimately the repair. It is our goal to accurately and truthfully describe each item, pointing out all flaws and defects, by providing as many high-quality pictures of each item as possible. However, sometimes things can be inadvertently overlooked.


We also take great pride in our shipping department and strive to make sure that each item is properly and securely packaged. Our daily UPS & USPS pick-up assures you of prompt delivery. We do ship internationally. For interested overseas buyers, please ask for a shipping quote before buying.

item.title: 1972 Fender Precision Bass Lefty Left-Handed Olympic White 8.4 lbs Narrow "A" Width Neck — $4,500
item.description:
$4,500 · Very Good · All My Bass Are Belong To You

Lefty 1972 Fender Precision Bass Left-Handed 

A real gem. An early 70’s lightweight alder P-Bass with a narrow “A" width neck. All original except for the pots and nut. Original custom-color Olympic White finish that's aging and yellowing beautifully. Looks and plays like butter.

I acquired it from the original owner, who gigged with it for many years in smoky Oregon bars. A few years ago, I sold it, then bought it back after missing it too much. Selling now because I've since acquired a pre-CBS Precision.


  • Weighs less than 8 lbs, 7 oz.
  • “A” neck profile with 1 1/2“ nut width (similar to a Jazz bass)
  • Original gray-bottom pickups dated 46th and 47th weeks (November) of 1972
  • One-piece maple neck with skunk stripe (no separate fingerboard)
  • Original neck, tuners, nut, bridge, knobs, neckplate, and pickguard
  • Lightweight alder body in custom color (Olympic White) that has faded and yellowed considerably from age, stage lights, and lots of cigarette smoke (bass and case smell like sweet tobacco)
  • Neck is straight and the truss rod turns easily and smoothly. Currently wearing LaBella 760FS flatwounds.
  • Frets have lot of life left
  • Lots of honest wear - many dings and finish checks
  • Many brown markings from the leather strap the original owner used, especially around the strap pins.
  • Non-original CTS pots dated 1983
  • Original owner drilled a small hole at the top of the pickguard so the “tugbar” could be moved to a “trumbrest” position
  • There's just a little bit of fret buzz in the upper frets, especially if you dig in. There's a shim included in the case, which would certainly help. I haven't needed because I rarely play up there and, when I do, play with a lighter touch.
  • The G-string tuner is bent slightly, but this doesn't affect it's performance at all. See pic.
  • The person I sold it to and bought it back from was a rightly and drilled a strap pin hole in the lower bout; see pic.
  • Comes with original chrome pickup cover, but no bridge coverOriginal lefty Fender case with working latches and handle


Please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks. 


Geoffrey

item.description:
$1,399 · Brand New · N Stuff Music

**Please Read Our Shop Policies

Way off the deep end! Just like the 44-01, dual Bartolini MK-1 split-coil soapbars are coupled with the MK-1 preamp. The 44's and 55's have that deep Lakland cutaway on the high register side of the neck that allows easy access to ALL 22 frets up the neck for throwing licks on top of your grooves.

And we have said it before: 35-inch scale necks make for killer low B's! That is why the low tones on Skyline 5-string basses boom with piano-like clarity!

item.title: Fender Japan '57 Precision Bass Reissue - 1988 MIJ - Surf Green w/HSC — $1,595
item.description:
$1,595 · Mint · Luke's Guitar Shop

This is a made in Japan Fender '57 Precision Bass. Hard to find surf green finish with Maple neck.  The finish has aged and the tuners have a bit of tarnish but overall this bass is extremely clean for its age.  It looks to have spent most of its life sitting in the case. This is a H serial number "Made in Japan" bass so it was made between 1988-1989.  The frets are in excellent shape and the bass plays cleanly up and down the neck with good action and no buzzes or issues. All controls and pickups work as they should. Bass is completely stock. A nice light and resonant bass at 8.24 lbs.  It comes in a period correct Fender USA hardshell case.  Please let me know if you have any questions.  No trade offers please. Thank you!

item.title: Fender Standard Precision Bass - 3-Color Sunburst - Free Shipping — $679.99
item.description:
$679.99 · Brand New · N Stuff Music

**Please Read Our Shop Policies

Originally released by Fender in 1951, the Precision Bass was a groundbreaking invention that allowed the bassists of the day to enjoy the fretted precision and amplified volume that their upright basses lacked, quickly making it the go-to foundational instrument chosen for countless landmark recordings.

Built to accompany players on their formative musical adventures, the Fender Standard Precision Bass delivers the approachable playability and inspiring tone that made Fender an icon of rock & roll. Powered by a Fender Standard pickup for versatile iconic tone and an inviting “Modern C”-shaped neck for superior playing comfort, this P Bass truly sets the standard for the Fender experience.

item.title: 5 String Ernie Ball® Music Man (No Screw Ears) — $14
item.description:
$14 · Brand New · Fat Bass Tone, LLC

FOR HOBBY BUILDERS, REPAIR TECHS AND PROFESSIONAL BUIDERS ALIKE


SAVE TIME


ETCHED CENTER LINES FOR ACCURACY


LASER CUT BY NORDSTRAND AUDIO & DELANO PICKUPS


DURABLE ACRYLIC



FREE SHIPPING IN THE USA

EXPERT TECHNICAL SUPPORT

IN STOCK MEANS IN STOCK

DESCRIPTION

Routing Templates for a variety of common pickup shapes.


Jazz Bass®, Precision Bass®, Music Man®, and Soapbar shape routing templates are produced by Nordstrand Audio on their laser cutter.


Approximate Size of Acrylic:4" [101.6mm] Length 6" [152.4mm] Wide .19" [4.8mm] Thick


Xtender shape routing templates are produced by Delano Pickups.


Approximate Size of Acrylic:3.9" [100mm] Length 6.2" [160mm] Wide .2" [5mm] Thick


Dimensions of the pickup route are slightly larger than the actual pickup by 1-2mm. This allows for very slight variations in manufacturer sizing, and also allows proper height adjustment for pickups.


NOTE: Always test-fit your pickup in the routing template before routing your bass.



ROUTING SHAPES

4 String Jazz Bridge: For pickup dimensions: 3.73” [94.74mm] Long, .72” [18.29mm] Wide


4 String Jazz Neck: For pickup dimensions: 3.6” [91.44mm] Long, .72” [18.29mm] Wide


5 String Fender® Jazz Bridge: For pickup dimensions: 4.1” [104.14 mm] Long, .73” [18.54 mm] Wide


5 String Fender® Jazz Neck: For pickup dimensions: 3.97” [100.84 mm] Long, .73” [18.54 mm] Wide


4 String Precision Bass®: For pickup dimensions: 2.26” [57.40 mm] Long, 1.10” [27.94 mm] Wide


5 String Fender® Precision Bass®: For pickup dimensions: Short Shell 2.26” [57.40 mm] Long, 1.10” [27.94 mm] Wide AND Long Shell 3.20” [81.28 mm] Long, 1.10” [27.94 mm] Wide


4 String Music Man®: For pickup dimensions: 4.0” [101.6 mm] Long, 1.895” [48.13 mm] Wide


5 String Wide Music Man® (DL Shape): For pickup dimensions: 4.14" [105.2mm] Long, 1.91" [48.5mm] Wide


5 String Music Man® (Ernie Ball® Shape - no screw ears): For pickup dimensions: 4.38" [111.8mm] Long, 1.92" [49mm] Wide


BC Shape: For pickup dimensions: 3.99” [101.35 mm] Long, 1.27” [32.36 mm] Wide


P2 Shape: For pickup dimensions: 4.27” [108.46 mm] Long, 1.27” [32.36 mm] Wide


P4 Shape: For pickup dimensions: 4.68” [118.75 mm] Long, 1.27” [32.36 mm] Wide


EMG® 35 Shape: For pickup dimensions: 3.5” [88.9mm] Long, 1.5” [38.1mm] Wide


EMG® 40 Shape: For pickup dimensions: 4.0” [101.6mm] Long, 1.5” [38.1mm] Wide

item.title: Rittenhouse Guitars Precision Bass 2023 - Sonic Blue — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Very Good · Top Tier Gear

This bass was custom ordered in 2023 with a sonic blue finish. I ordered Lollar pickups with the build, however, I've never opened the instrument and looked inside to confirm the pickup make. The pickups have a pretty aggressive mid-range attack but can be dialed back as needed. I personally enjoy the sound, but it's not naturally mellow. It's currently strung with a lighter gauge string. The finish is an NOS relic which can be seen in the photos. Hardware is also reliced. Some things to know about the bass are that it has a thick "U" shaped neck profile that may not suit all players. It also tends to have some neck dive due to the weight of the headstock. This can be addressed with a heavier bridge or by adding some 3M traction in your strap. The input has a strong snap and connection. The bass ships with the Fender Tweed case featured in the pictures. No returns. Item selling as is.

item.title: Used Ernie Ball Music Man Pino Palladino Artist Series — $2,599
item.description:
$2,599 · Excellent · Martel Music Store

Pre-owned Ernie Ball Music Man Pino Palladino Artist Series, with original mono bag. In excellent condition, with just some light pickmarks on the pickguard.

PINO PALLADINO ARTIST SERIES

The Pino Palladino Signature StingRay Bass captures the iconic tone and feel of one of the most influential bass players of all time. Inspired by Pino’s original 1979 fretless StingRay, this signature model is available in a fretted version, designed to deliver his unmistakable tone and playability. It features a poplar body finished in ‘79 Burst, a dark-tinted maple neck with a rosewood fingerboard, and a unique asymmetrical neck carve that mirrors the shape of Pino’s original bass. The custom pickup, built to a late 70s recipe with shorter pole pieces, pairs perfectly with the preamp, voiced to replicate the warmth and character of Pino’s aged circuit. Brass saddles, a GraphTech NuBone nut, and artist series neck plates. Each bass comes in a Mono Case for durability and protection.

The fretted model is strung with Pino Signature Smoothie Flats for a rich, thumpy tone.

PRODUCT FEATURES:

Unique Assymetic Neck Carve

Preamp voiced to Pino’s, including modified treble pot

Poplar Body

Dark Tinted Neck with Fretted Rosewood Fretboard

Brass Saddles

Pino Palladino Neck Plate

Pino Palladino StingRay Model Pino Palladino StingRay Body Wood Poplar Body Finish High Gloss Polyester Body Colors 79 Burst Bridge Pre-EB Geometry Music Man® Chrome Plated, Steel Bridge Plate with Brass Saddles and Stainless Steel Spring Mutes Pickguard 3 ply Black/White/Black Scale Length 34" Neck Radius 7.5" Frets Nickel (Frets) - Unlined (Fretless) Neck Width 1.686" at Nut; 2.458" at Heel Neck Wood Maple Fingerboard Rosewood Fret Markers White Dot (Frets) - N/A (Fretless) Neck Finish Polyester Neck Colors Dark Orange Tint Tuning Machines Schaller Bass Truss Rod Traditional Bullet Nut at Headstock, Walnut Skunk Stripe on back of neck Neck Attachment 3-Bolt, Pino Palladino Signature Neck Plate Controls 2-band active preamp, 25k Volume; 500k Treble and 100k Bass Pickups Late 70's voiced Music Man humbucker with pole pieces that sit flush Strings  38w-54w-68w-98w Extra Light Pino Palladino Smoothie Flats (Fretted)

item.title: Ibanez SR1800E-NTF Premium Soundgear 2014 - 2017 - Natural Flat — $950
item.description:
$950 · Very Good · Fourthtunz Gear Garage

awesome bass! great sounding and easy to play. Includes strap and a gig bag that is banged up

but has great padding. the zippers on the back need to be fixed.


solid body electric bass model introduced by Ibanez for 2014. It was produced in Indonesia as part of the mid-tier Premium line. In the US market it was referred to as the SR1800E.

The SR1800 features a rosewood and flamed maple top and mahogany back on a double-cutaway walnut body bolted to a titanium reinforced wenge and bubinga Atlas neck with a 24-fret rosewood fingerboard with binding and abalone oval position markers. Components include a pair of Nordstrand Big Single passive pickups with an Ibanez custom preamp with a three-band EQ, individual Mono-rail IV bridges with 19mm string spacing, a GraphTech Black TUSQ nut, and Gotoh tuning machines.

For 2016 the Mono-rail IV bridges were replaced with the Mono-rail V.

The SR1805 and SR1806E are five string and six string versions, respectively. The SR1900E is a similar model with rosewood top & back on an ash body. The SR1600 is a similar model with a poplar burl top.

The SR1800 was discontinued after 2017.

item.title: Bartolini AGMPB Adjustable Gain Piezo Buffer — $104
item.description:
$104 · Brand New · Fat Bass Tone, LLC

AGMPB = ADJUSTABLE GAIN MAGNETIC-PIEZO BUFFER

USE THIS HANDY LITTLE PREAMP TO BALANCE THE SIGNALS OF PIEZO AND MAGENETIC PICKUPS

PIEZO AND MAGNETIC SIGNALS EACH HAVE THEIR OWN MINI CONTROL POT

THE AGMPB CAN WORK WITH A PREAMP

THE AGMPB REPLACES BART'S OLD MPB2 PIEZO BUFFER AND NOW ALLOWS FOR ADJUSTABLE GAIN ON BOTH CHANNELS

FREE SHIPPING IN THE USAEXPERT TECHNICAL SUPPORTIN STOCK MEANS IN STOCKDESCRIPTION

Dual-channel buffer/preamp with totally flat response and independently adjustable gain on both the piezo and magnetic channels.

The AGMPB/918 is a dual-channel buffer/preamp that provides a high impedance input for use with piezo or microphonic transducers and channel isolation for magnetic pickups. Both channels are equipped with trimmers for adjustable gain allowing you to boost the output signal up to 12dB (4x) while maintaining a perfectly flat response. It is less than 1/2 the size of a 9-volt battery making it ideal for instruments with limited cavity space.

The AGMPB/918 provides a powerful output signal and isolation from external equipment that may otherwise adversely affect pickup tone. This is an upgrade replacement for the MPB2-918 simplifying wiring and adding true gain adjustment to both channels.

The AGMPBoo is a further advancement that adds connector pins for up to 7 industry standard piezo bridge saddle plugs. This simplifies wiring connections further and eliminates the need for a separate 2.0mm pitch summing connector.

The AGMPB/918 and the AGMPBoo are ideal for providing excellent tone from an instrument with 1 or 2 magnetic pickups and a piezo bridge pickup. Both channels deliver clear and transparent sound with extremely low distortion. Like all of Bartolini preamps, it is internally shielded to reject electromagnetic noise and includes filters to block AM and FM radio signals on the inputs. Bartolini set the standard for fully sealing the sensitive electronics. They use only professional double tin-plated pure copper wire with durable semi-rigid insulation. This ensures that the 4-inch pre-stripped wires do not flop around in the cavity and that the wire does not cut through the insulation over time.

Both buffers can be used with a single 9-volt battery (9-volt operation) or with two 9-volt batteries wired in series (18-volt operation) for 6dB extra headroom with no tonal change. Both deliver clear and transparent sound with extremely low distortion. The buffers are sold as a kit that include a 25KOhm blend pot.

TECH & DIMENSIONS

Module Size:
1.05" [26.7mm] Long
0.79" [20.1mm] Wide
0.43" [10.9mm] Thick

Operating Voltage: 9V or 18V

Magnetic Channel Input Impedance: 1MΩ

Piezo Channel Input Impedance: 3.3MΩ

Output Impedance: 3.6KΩ



Magnetic Channel
The pre-wired gain trimmer lets you adjust the output level of the magnetic channel.
Gain: 0-12dB

Piezo Channel
The pre-wired gain trimmer lets you adjust the output level of the piezo channel.
Gain: 0-12dB

AGMPB/918 Wiring diagram

item.title: Legator HB4SS-JB Electric Bass - Jupiter Burst — $1,099.99
item.description:
$1,099.99 · Brand New · Haggerty's Music

-YOU ARE VIEWING PHOTOS OF THE ACTUAL BASS BEING SOLD!

This brand new 8.8 lb Legator will ship insured, fully set up, and inspected from Rapid City, SD.

Buy risk free with our 14 day - full refund, less shipping, return policy. Check out our shop policies for more details.

The Legator HB-4 STD is built for players who demand modern performance without sacrificing musicality. From its striking burl top to its sleek set-thru construction, this bass is designed to look every bit as bold as it sounds. Whether you’re holding down the groove on stage, tracking in the studio, or exploring new techniques, it delivers the kind of comfort and confidence that lets your playing take center stage.

Its basswood body and satin-finished three-piece maple neck create a balanced, resonant foundation with effortless playability across the full 34-inch scale. The ebony fingerboard, generous 18-inch radius, and smooth neck construction encourage fast runs, precise articulation, and comfortable access to every fret. Equipped with a pair of Aftershock soapbar humbuckers, a versatile active 3-band EQ, blend control, and passive/active switching, this bass can move seamlessly from warm, vintage-inspired tones to aggressive modern punch, giving you the flexibility to fit virtually any musical style.

Premium hardware, including the Legator Pro Series Monorail bridge and precision tuners, keeps tuning stable and your performance locked in from the first note to the last. Combining eye-catching looks with exceptional versatility and a player-focused design, the Legator Pro Series Bass is ready for any stage or session. Available now at Haggerty’s Music.

Features / Specs

Highlights

  • Series: HB-4
  • Orientation: Right-Handed
  • Color: Jupiter Burst

Body

  • Body Top Material: Buckeye Burl Maple

item.title: Squier Affinity Series Active Jazz Bass - Olympic White w/Maple — $499.99
item.description:
$499.99 · Brand New · Dave's Guitar Shop

From Squier:

"A superb gateway into the time-honored Fender® family, the Squier® Affinity Series™ Active Jazz Bass® delivers legendary design and quintessential tone for today’s aspiring bassist. This J Bass® features several player-friendly refinements such as a thin and lightweight body, a slim and comfortable “C”-shaped neck with retro block inlays and vintage-style open-gear tuning machines for smooth, accurate tuning. Loaded with two Squier Noiseless™ J Bass pickups shaped by an active 9V 2-band preamp for a wide variety of punchy tones, this model is ready to help lay the foundation for any player at any stage."

Olympic White, Crafted in China, Gloss polyurethane body finish, Poplar body, C shaped Maple neck, 9.5" Maple fingerboard with the black block inlays and medium jumbo frets, 34" scale length, 1.5" nut width, Squier ceramic noiseless Jazz Bass bridge and neck pickups, Active 9 volt preamp with the master volume/pickup balance and stacked bass/treble boost or cut controls, Standard bridge with the barrel steel saddles, Vintage style open gear tuners, 9.2 pounds, Case not included

item.title: Fender Vintera II '70s Telecaster Bass with Maple Fretboard 2023 - 2026 - Vintage White — $900
item.description:
$900 · Excellent · Mark’s Gear Outlet

Setup by a local music shop.

Truss rod is tightened 100.

Easy to play and in tune.


Ships with black fender gig bag and free shipping to 48 states.

Description taken from Guitar Center‘s website:
Revive the timeless sound of the '70s with the Fender Vintera II '70s Telecaster Bass and experience the iconic looks, inspiring feel and incomparable tone that only a Fender can deliver.

The Vintera II '70s Telecaster Bass features an alder body and a maple neck for classic Fender tone that’s full of punch and clarity. The mid-'70s C-shape neck is based on a classic '70s profile for an intuitive and inviting feel, while the 7.25" radius fingerboard with vintage-tall frets provide vintage comfort with ample room for big bends and expressive vibrato. Under the hood, the vintage-style wide-range bass humbucker delivers the iconic Fender sound: warm, woody, dynamic and powerful. The vintage-style 2-saddle bridge and vintage-style Fender-stamped tuning machines provide classic looks with enhanced intonation and tuning stability to complete the package.

Experience the unmistakable vintage feel and unmatched sound of a classic Fender with the Vintera II '70s Telecaster Bass today and start making music history.

item.title: Ibanez MDM1000PW MDM 4str Electric Bass w/Bag - Pearl White — $1,055.99
item.description:
$1,055.99 · Mint · Focus Pro Audio

The Ibanez MDM1000PW is a 4-string electric bass from the Mode Series, blending classic bass design with modern innovations. Crafted for versatile playing styles, it features an alder body, a 1-piece roasted maple neck, and a rosewood fretboard, providing a rich, balanced tone. Its Super All Access neck joint and ergonomic C-profile neck ensure smooth playability and easy access to all 24 frets.

Equipped with Delta S4J pickups and the Ibanez Sonitech S preamp, it offers exceptional tonal versatility, including a 3-band EQ, EQ bypass switch, and 3-way mid-frequency Hexa system. The MR5S mono-rail bridge ensures clarity and sustain, while lightweight Aero-light tuners offer precise tuning stability. Finished in Pearl White and including a gig bag, the MDM1000PW is ideal for bassists seeking professional sound and performance.

Alder Body:

Provides a bright, well-balanced tone with rich resonance and sustain.

1-Piece Roasted Maple Neck:

Thin C-profile neck offers fast, comfortable playability with extreme stability and a visually rich finish.

Rosewood Fretboard:

Delivers a solid, focused midrange tone.

Medium Stainless Steel Frets:

Ensures snappy tonal response, clean bends, and long-term durability.

Super All Access Neck Joint:

Ergonomic design allows smooth access to all 24 frets.

Luminescent Side Dot Markers:

Offer clear fretboard guidance for dark stage environments.

Delta S4J Pickups:

Aggressive yet balanced single-coil tone with hum-canceling design for clarity and noise reduction.

Ibanez Sonitech S Preamp 3-Band EQ:

Comprehensive tonal control, including master volume, balancer, master tone, bass, middle, treble, EQ bypass switch, and 3-way mid-frequency Hexa system.

MR5S Mono-Rail Bridge:

Transfers string vibration efficiently, enhances sustain and clarity, with adjustable string spacing.

Ibanez Aero-Light Tuners:

Lightweight, durable tuners for precise tuning stability.

Included Gig Bag:

Custom-fitted for safe transport and protection.

item.title: 2026 Fender Player II Mustang Bass PJ Maple Fingerboard Cactus Gray — $849.99
item.description:
$849.99 · Brand New · D-Town Guitars

Step into the spotlight and experience iconic Fender® sound and style with the Player II Mustang® Bass PJ — a stage-ready bass guitar with contemporary updates to power your performance and inspire your playing.

The Player II Mustang® Bass PJ radiates timeless Fender charm, but under the hood, it's primed for today's players. Everything about the neck is designed for fast and fluid playability, from the Modern “C”-profile with silky satin urethane finish on the back to the comfy 9.5”-radius slab rosewood or maple fingerboard with smooth rolled edges and 19 medium jumbo frets. A classic alder body is available in both timeless Fender finishes and never-before-seen colors unearthed from the archives. Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil P bass® and Single-Coil J bass® pickups offer sweet highs, growling mids and seismic lows that elevate any genre. The 3-way toggle switch lets you easily dial in everything this versatile pickup set has to offer, while an adjustable 4-saddle bridge, single-groove steel saddles and open-gear tuners ensure precise tuning stability for the flexibility to explore endless sonic possibilities.

Perfect for crafting your own sound, the Player II Mustang® Bass PJ has the looks, tone and feel that only a Fender delivers.

Features

  • Alder Body
  • Modern "C" Neck Profile
  • 9.5“-Radius Maple or Rosewood Fingerboard with Rolled Edges
  • Player Series Alnico V Split-Coil Precision Bass® and Alnico V Single-Coil Jazz Bass® Pickups
  • 4-Saddle Bridge with Single-Groove Steel “Barrel” Saddles
  • Open-Gear Tuning Machines
